title: ACHIEVING CONTENTMENT | HG AMITASANA DAS | GITA LIFE Live

Hare Krishna. A warm welcome to all of you for today's live session. The topic for the
day is Achieving Contentment. All of us without
fail are looking for happiness, peace of mind, contentment, satisfaction. But in present
times we see all of these things are for most of the people elusive. People are battling
for these things in different ways. So in today's session we will understand from Gita's
perspective what Lord Krishna is.
Krishna has to say as far as achieving contentment, satisfaction and happiness is concerned.
So we will start the discussion with prayers to Lord Shri Krishna, to Lord Chaitanya Mahaprabhu,
Krishna Prabhupada to bless us so that we can have a very very meaningful, fruitful
discussion with lot of wonderful insights which we can take and apply in our lives.
So please join me. You can fold your hands.
And repeat these prayers along with me.
Nama Om Vishnupadaya Krishna Preshtaya Bhutale
Srimate Bhaktivedanta Svamin Nithinamine
Namaste Saraswate Deve Gauravani Pracharine
Nirvishesha Shunyam Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata Nirmata
Nirmata Vys 앉wadi

The first aspect which we will cover today is to know the root cause of dissatisfaction

The root cause why most of the people are not experiencing contentment in life.

experiencing contentment.
In the Bhagavad Gita, Krishna talks about the senses and the mind extensively.
Krishna says, mamayi amsho jiva loke, we are his amshas.
We are his parents.
We are his children.
We are his children.
We are his parts.
And just like Krishna is always happy, always blissful, always contented, always satisfied,
we also as amshas, as parts are meant to be always happy, always satisfied.
But that's not our present state.
So, therefore Krishna says…
mamayi amsho jiva loke!
jivabhuta sanatana, we are eternal. But mana shashtha indriyani, mana means mind, shashtha
indriyani, including the mind, mind and the five senses. Mana shashtha indriyani, prakriti,
sthani, karshati, we are battling, we are waging a war with mother nature, material nature.
It is like a chess game, the nature makes a move, we try to counter the move, just like
now we have coronavirus challenge world over and the nature has retaliated in the form
of misery and we are now fighting hard to circumvent that problem, to find a vaccine
which will cure this.
So, called viral infections or make us immune to them. And this battle goes on, we are waging
a battle with material nature. So, mana shashtha indriyani with the mind and the five senses,
totally six of them. So, the senses, extensively Krishna talks about, you know, we have the
five senses, eyes, ears, nose, tongue, touch and we are trying to enjoy this world through
our senses, by gratifying our senses. And our normal understanding of happiness is,
what will make us happy if we can gratify our senses more and more, enjoy our senses
more and more, eat the best of eatables. Although, you know, the body has limitations,
we can't eat beyond a point, but the desire is that if we can eat more and more, more
and more tasty things, we will have more and more pleasure and hence we will have more
and more happiness. Now, in the Bhagavad Gita and our scriptures, the senses are compared
to venomous serpents. Not just the serpents, not just the snakes, venomous serpents, poisonous
serpents. In fact, it is mentioned that even a saintly person, this is mentioned in the
seventh canto of the Srimad Bhagavatam, when Prahlad Maharaj, you know, Hrindakashyapu
was killed by Narasimha Dev.
Here it is mentioned that even when a snake or a scorpion is killed, a saintly person
also becomes happy. Generally, the trend is that we don't want to unnecessarily kill anyone.
We don't want to hurt any other living entities.
But because these two specific creatures, snakes and scorpions are very envious, for
no reason.
And the snake is even more dangerous because unlike other creatures, other animals which
can make sound, which can make some kind of roar just like a tiger, you can see them approaching,
you can hear them approaching, they make a sound, whereas a snake slithers, just moves,
crawls without making a sound and can come and bite a person.
And even kill a person.

which are sinful based on which we are suffering, or because of which we are in unfavorable circumstances.
We in meny brakti vakti through devotion through approaching the Lord,
We in medosaurus Gulati,
Worshiping the Lord, begging the Lord, praying to the Lord, depending on the Lord, surrendering
to the Lord can burn to ashes.
Krishna says, sarva dharmaan parityajya mam ekam saranda to me and then he says, I will
free you from all sinful reactions, do not fear.
So that is the process which is recommended.
To burn all the reactions and make our life all auspicious.
This last question from Chatura Reddy, when we are not satisfied with our bhakti due to
lamentation of past sinful activities and past character, how to forgive ourselves and
believe that even a sinful person can be a devotee?
I just now answered.
Whatever our past sinful reactions, there is no need of crying over spilt milk, happened
is happened.
Let us do the best we can in the present and going forward.
The Lord will bless us.
Question from Rohit Gangadhara, how do we understand the difference between civilization
and spiritualization?
How do we balance our growth in both factors in our daily life?
Prabhupada has given wonderful instructions to balance our spiritual and material life.
He has given us a sandwich program, morning we remember the Lord.
Do our household duties.
Responsibly, course of the day and end the day again remembering the Lord.
This question is from Shiti Chandra, how to surrender completely under the lotus feet
of the Supreme Master and Krishna practically?
Philosophically we know everything is done by the Supreme, but how to have firm faith
and surrender?
We can have firm faith and surrender by associating with a devotee who has firm faith and surrender.
If you associate with a person who has firm faith and surrender, you can have firm faith
and surrender.
If you associate with a person who has firm faith and surrender, you can have firm faith
and surrender.
If you associate with a person who is rich, he has the ability to even share his wealth
and make you rich.
Suppose you are in touch with a person who is a billionaire, for him to give you a million
dollars is much easy.
He doesn't lose much, he doesn't dent his fortune and you can be rich.
So likewise when we associate with devotees who have faith, who are surrendered, their
faith, their surrender rubs on us.
That's why it is important that we associate with devotees who have faith, who are surrendered,
their faith, their surrender rubs on us.
So likewise when we associate with devotees who have faith, who are surrendered, their
faith, their surrender rubs on us.
That's why it is important that we associate with devotees who have faith, who are surrendered,
their faith, who are surrendered, their faith rubs on us.
That's why it is important that we regularly participate in satsang.
This question is from Virupaksha, why don't we remember our past life, I just now answered.
We will be a confused lot if we remember all our previous lives.
Therefore Lord mercifully makes us forget our previous life experiences.
This question is from KR, world is controlled by evil forces trying to control and business.
Looks like Lord has sanctioned it.
Living a decent life is becoming economically difficult.
Will this evil people get destroyed?
We should not have a very negative outlook to life.
Yes there are negative people, yes there are people who are positive, there are demoniac
people, there are also pious people.
All what we have to do is, we have to take shelter of the Lord, whatever circumstances
we are in, whatever world we are living in.
Let us not have negative outlook to life.
Let us not have negative outlook to life.
We should have a very very negative outlook and it's a wonderful opportunity we have
to chant the names of the Lord, purify our life, increase our attachment to the Lord.
Let's make best use of that opportunity.
And all these demoniac forces which are there will automatically be taken care of, at least
in our lives and individually and collectively in the world together.
All what we should do is try to maximize our attachment and devotion to the Lord.
